title: storage: fix cirrus ci
body:
No longer built fuse-overlayfs and bats from source, we have latest versions in the CI images already.

The CI broke as fuse-overlayfs was rewritten in rust we can no longer compile it like this.


<!--- Please read the [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/containers/container-libs/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md) before proceeding --->

comments.body: @mtrmac @giuseppe PTAL, this will be needed to unblock CI.
